subject: A towering stone golem standing watch in a snow-blanketed mountain pass, its weathered carved body half-buried in drift and ice
description: A massive humanoid stone construct stands amid a frozen mountain pass, its body covered in carved runes and weathered grooves that suggest centuries of erosion. Snow has gathered on its shoulders and around its base. Behind the golem rise jagged, ice-capped peaks under a pale, washed-out sky. The figure faces forward and looms large in the frame, dominating the composition. The palette is dominated by cold whites, grey-blues, and the muted ochre-brown of weathered stone. A faint mist or fine snow softens the distant ridgeline.
foreground: stone golem covered in carved runes, partially buried in snow
background: jagged ice-capped mountain peaks under a pale overcast sky
